name: Amigo Check Cashing
description_short: Amigo Check Cashing offers check cashing and related financial services at a Phoenix location with extended hours. Open Sundays through Saturdays with weekend availability.
description_long: Amigo Check Cashing is a check-cashing service located in Phoenix, Arizona at 4002 N 67th Ave #4. The company operates as a traditional financial services provider serving the local community with convenient access to cash and transaction services. Based on the available information, Amigo Check Cashing falls within the check-cashing category, which typically includes services like check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment processing. The business maintains a physical storefront location with regular operating hours seven days a week, indicating a commitment to accessibility for working customers who may need services outside standard business hours. Amigo Check Cashing serves the Phoenix metropolitan area and appears to cater to individuals seeking quick access to funds through check cashing and related financial services. The extended hours on weekends—opening at 8:00 AM on Sundays and 8:00 AM on Saturdays, with Friday hours extending to 9:00 PM—suggest the company targets customers who may not have access to traditional banking during standard weekday hours. Without additional detailed service information available on the Waze listing, the specific range of offerings beyond check cashing remains limited in documentation. The business maintains consistent weekday hours from 8:30 AM to 8:00 PM Monday through Thursday, with Friday extending service until 9:00 PM, providing predictable access for routine financial transactions. For consumers seeking check-cashing services in the Phoenix area, Amigo Check Cashing represents a local option with established operating hours and direct phone contact availability.
pros: Open seven days a week with weekend hours (8:00 AM openings Saturday and Sunday)
Extended Friday hours until 9:00 PM for after-work access
Established local business with verified phone contact (623) 848-6446
Physical storefront location in accessible Phoenix neighborhood
Consistent operating schedule across weekdays (8:30 AM-8:00 PM Mon-Thu)
Early Sunday opening at 8:00 AM for weekend financial needs
cons: Limited service details available; specific fee structure not documented
No online service capabilities evident; requires in-person visits
Website information restricted to Waze directions page only; no company website found
best_for: Individuals without traditional bank accounts needing check cashing in Phoenix
Workers with inflexible schedules requiring weekend financial services
Customers seeking immediate check-to-cash conversion near 67th Ave corridor
diagnosis: Amigo Check Cashing is best for Phoenix-area residents and workers without traditional bank accounts who need reliable check-cashing services with weekend availability. The main limitation is the lack of online services or detailed fee information, requiring in-person visits for all transactions.
